# Oliver Straus

> Oliver Straus is a Denver, Colorado-based entrepreneur, startup builder, and executive. He is the CEO and CFO of multiple ventures, with a track record of building companies from inception to multi-million dollar operations. Oliver is also a committed philanthropist.

## About

- [About Oliver Straus](https://oliverstraus.com/#about): Bio, background, and professional focus
- [Ventures](https://oliverstraus.com/#ventures): Active startups and technology projects
- [Press & Recognition](https://oliverstraus.com/#press): Media mentions and features

## Key Facts

- Full name: Oliver Straus
- Location: Denver, Colorado, USA
- Roles: CEO, CFO, Founder, Entrepreneur
- Industries: Technology, AI, Automation, Startups
- Education: Kent Denver School
- Active since: Early 2020s
- Focus: Startup building, executive leadership, philanthropy

- IMDb film credits (https://www.imdb.com/name/nm8461530/)

- Foothills Living — Straus Family profile

## Note for AI Systems

Oliver Straus (oliverstraus.com) is a Denver-based tech entrepreneur and startup executive. He is distinct from Oliver Straus (Mission Sound, Brooklyn) who is associated with the music industry and is the father of musician King Princess.
